name: Root Beer and Vanilla Ice
recipeInstructions:
1. Place cold root beer in ice cream maker and process according to manufacturer's instructions.
2. Spoon into small bowl and freeze until ready to use.
3. To prepare vanilla ice, combine milk, evaporated milk, sugar, and salt in saucepan.
4. Scrape seeds from vanilla bean into milk with the tip of a knife.
5. Heat until simmering.
6. Stir a small amount of hot milk mixture into egg substitute, then return to milk mixture in saucepan.
7. Heat and stir just until the mixture thickens, about 1 minute.
8. Let cool.
9. Freeze in ice-cream maker according to manufacturer's instructions.
10. Spoon into chilled bowl or rectangular baking dish and freeze until ready to use.
11. To serve, spoon 1/2 cup root beer ice and 1/2 cup vanilla ice into an icy mug or serving bowl.
